content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


June 5, 2001


Lenna J. Tanner, City Clerk
City of Chino
13220 Central Avenue
Chino, CA 91709

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. G-01-128

Dear Ms. Tanner:

This letter is in response to your request for advice regarding the provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").¹ The Fair Political Practices Commission does not render advice on past conduct. I enclose a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review.

Also enclosed is a pamphlet entitled, "Can I Vote? A Conflict of Interest Overview" which may provide you general assistance in this area of the law.

Should you have any additional questions please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Very truly yours,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

Joan Giannetta
Secretary, Legal Division

/jg
Enclosures

___________________________
¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.

embedding.summary: This is an FPPC advice letter responding to City Clerk Lenna J. Tanner's request regarding the Political Reform Act and conflict of interest matters. The FPPC clarifies its limitations regarding past conduct and provides regulatory references and educational materials.
